title: horkelia daucifolia subsp. typica
intro: Horkelia daucifolia subsp. typica, also known as Western horkelia or mountain horkelia, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Horkelia daucifolia subsp. typica are thought to include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water or using them as a tincture.
